_comment: MetaGenesis Core Policy Gate Configuration - Infinity Protocol v2.0
_description: Protects locked phases and enforces allowlist for repository modifications

_schema.locked_paths: List of glob patterns for HARD BLOCKED paths (locked phases)
_schema.allow_globs: List of glob patterns for ALLOWED modifications

_notes.locked_paths_purpose: HARD BLOCK any modifications to production-sealed phases (30R-42)
_notes.allow_globs_purpose: ALLOWLIST for permitted modifications (docs, tests, CI, new features)
_notes.enforcement_mode: STRICT - all changed files must match at least one allow_glob AND not match any locked_path
_notes.phase_42_protection: Phase 42 Vision Layer is fully locked: backend/vision/**, api/vision_api.py, legal signature, archives, tests
_notes.infinity_stack_protection: Phases 30R-36 locked: scheduler, tracking, loop_diffusion, infinity, drift_synthesizer, phase_36
_notes.meta_science_protection: Phases 37-41 locked: physics, chem, lab, safety, API files
